title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Ergo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Ergo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
